title: Remove End
description: Teleports any player who attempts to enter the End dimension back into the Overworld.
body:
Remove End is a datapack that disables the End dimension by teleporting any player who joins back into the Overworld. They will be spawned at an extremely high altitude (y330), because why not. :)

- Removing the End can improve the player experience by removing the Elytra, Shulker Boxes, and the Ender Dragon. Limiting these gameplay elements (the elytra.) will force players to create transportation and innovate to work with the challenges.
